---
title: "EMIS"
page-layout: article
---

# EMIS

## Description

Market intelligence platform providing company, industry, country, and news data for emerging and established markets. Supports global business, market, and economic research.

## Listing categories

- **Subject area:** Business & Economics, News & Media
- **Data/resource type:** Company & Organization Data, News & Current Events, Government & International Statistics
- **Access model:** Yale Licensed
- **Displayed topic:** Company & Organization Data, News & Current Events, Government & International Statistics

## Access notes

If you are prompted to login, select the Guest Access option.

## Links

- [Access resource](https://library.yale.edu/eresources/access/access-emis)

[Back to Datasets & Databases](../datasets.qmd)
